actor.goal: the ndd CLI to open a governed doorway into the conveyor

story.iWant: the ndd CLI to open a governed doorway into the conveyor
story.soThat: operator intent enters execution without becoming hand-authored product truth

acceptanceCriteria.statement: NDD CLI Doorway owns only: argument boundary, stdin boundary, command invocation, resolver invocation shell, exit code mapping.
NDD CLI Doorway must not own: product meaning, DTO shaping, worker output truth, visual layout truth, release authority.
Every materialized output must be receipt-backed.
No invisible execution path is allowed.

forbiddenClaims: NDD CLI Doorway owns product meaning
NDD CLI Doorway owns DTO shaping
NDD CLI Doorway owns worker output truth
NDD CLI Doorway owns visual layout truth
NDD CLI Doorway owns release authority
